title: orchestrate plugin config
description: Tuning knobs for the orchestrate plugin. The SessionStart hook and the /orchestrate skill both read this file so behavior stays consistent across entry points.

autonomy.description: How autonomous Opus is once it has a delegation plan. propose = show the plan and wait for OK; auto = fan out immediately; threshold = auto when under the threshold limits, otherwise propose.

threshold.description: Limits used when autonomy=threshold. At or below these, fan out automatically; above either, propose first.

tiers.description: Which model each kind of delegated work runs on. Aliases (opus|sonnet|haiku|fable) or a full model ID.

doctrine.description: How forcefully the SessionStart hook injects the delegation doctrine. off = no injection; standard = inject as guidance; strict = inject as a hard rule.

alwaysPassModelExplicitly.description: Instruct Opus to pass the model parameter explicitly on every Agent call, working around the frontmatter model bug (anthropics/claude-code#44385).
